Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.

(** ** Displayed Natural Transformations *)
Section Disp_Nat_Trans.

  Definition disp_nat_trans_data
             {C' C : precategory_data}
             {F' F : functor_data C' C}
             (a : forall x, F' x --> F x)
             {D' : disp_cat_data C'}
             {D : disp_cat_data C}
             (R' : disp_functor_data F' D' D)
             (R : disp_functor_data F D' D) :=
    forall (x : C')  (xx : D' x),
      R' x  xx -->[ a x ] R x xx .

  Definition disp_nat_trans_axioms
             {C' C : precategory_data}
             {F' F : functor_data C' C}
             {a : nat_trans F' F}
             {D' : disp_cat_data C'}
             {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {R' : disp_functor_data F' D' D}
             {R : disp_functor_data F D' D}
             (b : disp_nat_trans_data a R' R) : UU
    :=
    forall (x' x : C') (f : x' --> x)
      (xx' : D' x') (xx : D' x)
      (ff : xx' -->[ f ] xx),
      ♯ R'  ff ;; b _ xx =
        transportb _ (nat_trans_ax a _ _ f ) (b _ xx' ;; ♯ R ff).

  
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans_data a R' R
isaprop (disp_nat_trans_axioms b)

  
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans_data a R' R
isaprop (disp_nat_trans_axioms b)

    
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans_data a R' R
t, t0: C'
t1: C' ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t2: D' t
t3: D' t0
t4: t2 -->[ t1] t3
isofhlevel 1
  (♯ R' t4 ;; b t0 t3 =
   transportb (mor_disp (R' t t2) (R t0 t3))
     (nat_trans_ax a t t0 t1) (b t t2 ;; ♯ R t4))

    apply homsets_disp.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_nat_trans
             {C' C : precategory_data}
             {F' F : functor_data C' C}
             (a : nat_trans F' F)
             {D' : disp_cat_data C'}
             {D : disp_cat_data C}
             (R' : disp_functor_data F' D' D)
             (R : disp_functor_data F D' D) : UU :=
    ∑ b : disp_nat_trans_data a R' R,
        disp_nat_trans_axioms b.

  Definition disp_nat_trans_pr1
             {C' C : precategory_data}
             {F' F : functor_data C' C}
             {a : nat_trans F' F}
             {D' : disp_cat_data C'}
             {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {R' : disp_functor_data F' D' D}
             {R : disp_functor_data F D' D}
             (b : disp_nat_trans a R' R)
             {x : C'}  (xx : D' x):
    R' x  xx -->[ a x ] R x xx
    := pr1 b x xx.

  Coercion disp_nat_trans_pr1 : disp_nat_trans >-> Funclass.

  Definition disp_nat_trans_ax
             {C' C : precategory_data}
             {F' F : functor_data C' C}
             {a : nat_trans F' F}
             {D' : disp_cat_data C'}
             {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {R' : disp_functor_data F' D' D}
             {R : disp_functor_data F D' D}
             (b : disp_nat_trans a R' R)
             {x' x : C'}
             {f : x' --> x}
             {xx' : D' x'}
             {xx : D' x}
             (ff : xx' -->[ f ] xx):
    ♯ R'  ff ;; b _ xx =
      transportb _ (nat_trans_ax a _ _ f ) (b _ xx' ;; ♯ R ff)
    :=
    pr2 b _ _ f _ _ ff.

  
C', C: precategory_data
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat_data C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
b x' xx' ;; ♯ R ff =
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R x xx))
  (nat_trans_ax a x' x f) (♯ R' ff ;; b x xx)

  
C', C: precategory_data
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat_data C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
b x' xx' ;; ♯ R ff =
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R x xx))
  (nat_trans_ax a x' x f) (♯ R' ff ;; b x xx)

    
C', C: precategory_data
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat_data C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R x xx))
  (! nat_trans_ax a x' x f) (b x' xx' ;; ♯ R ff) =
♯ R' ff ;; b x xx

    apply pathsinv0, disp_nat_trans_ax.
  Defined.


  (** identity disp_nat_trans *)

  
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), id_disp (R' x xx))

  
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), id_disp (R' x xx))

    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
id_disp (R' x' xx') ;; ♯ R' ff =
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R' x xx))
  (! id_right ((# F')%cat f) @
   ! (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F') x' x f))
  (♯ R' ff)

    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
transportb (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R' x xx))
  (id_left ((# F')%cat f)) (♯ R' ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R' x xx))
  (! id_right ((# F')%cat f) @
   ! (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F') x' x f))
  (♯ R' ff)

    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R' x xx))
  (! id_left ((# F')%cat f)) (♯ R' ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (R' x' xx') (R' x xx))
  (! id_right ((# F')%cat f) @
   ! (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F') x' x f))
  (♯ R' ff)

    apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
  Qed.


  
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F') R' R'

  
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F') R' R'

    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F') R' R'
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F') R' R',
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F') R' R'
 
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
x: C'
xx: D' x
R' x xx -->[ nat_trans_id F' x] R' x xx

      apply id_disp.
    
C', C: category
F': functor_data C' C
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F') R' R',
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  ((λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), id_disp (R' x xx))
   :
   disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F') R' R')
 apply disp_nat_trans_id_ax.
  Defined.

  (** composition of disp_nat_trans *)

  
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b' x xx ;; b x xx)

  
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b' x xx ;; b x xx)

    
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
x', x: C'
f: C' ⟦ x', x ⟧
xx': D' x'
xx: D' x
ff: xx' -->[ f] xx
transportf (mor_disp (R'' x' xx') (R x xx))
  (assoc (a' x') ((# F')%cat f) (a x))
  (b' x' xx' ;; (♯ R' ff ;; b x xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (R'' x' xx') (R x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (a' x'))
     (nat_trans_ax a x' x f) @
   ! ((cancel_postcomposition (a' x' · (# F')%cat f)
         ((# F'')%cat f · a' x) (a x)
         (! nat_trans_ax a' x' x f) @
       ! (! (! assoc ((# F'')%cat f) (a' x) (a x) @
             ! (! nat_trans_ax
                    (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) x'
                    x f)))) @
      ! assoc (a' x') (a x') ((# F)%cat f)))
  (b' x' xx' ;; (♯ R' ff ;; b x xx))

    apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R'' R

  
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R'' R

    
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R''
  R
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R'' R,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R''
  R
 
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
x: C'
xx: D' x
R'' x xx -->[ nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a x] R x xx

      apply (comp_disp (b' _ _ )  (b _ _ )).
    
C', C: category
F'', F', F: functor_data C' C
a': F'' ⟹ F'
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R'': disp_functor_data F'' D' D
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b': disp_nat_trans a' R'' R'
b: disp_nat_trans a R' R
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a) R'' R,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  ((λ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b' x xx ;; b x xx)
   :
   disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_comp F'' F' F a' a)
     R'' R)
 apply disp_nat_trans_comp_ax.
  Defined.

  
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
(∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx) → b = b'

  
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D

b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
(∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx) → b = b'

F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
b = b'

    
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
isPredicate disp_nat_trans_axioms
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
pr1 b = pr1 b'

    
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
isPredicate disp_nat_trans_axioms
 
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
r: disp_nat_trans_data a R' R
isaprop (disp_nat_trans_axioms r)
  apply isaprop_disp_nat_trans_axioms. 
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
pr1 b = pr1 b'

    
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
homotsec (pr1 b) (pr1 b')
 
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
x: C'
pr1 b x = pr1 b' x

    
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
x: C'
homotsec (pr1 b x) (pr1 b' x)
  
C', C: category
F', F: functor_data C' C
a: F' ⟹ F
D': disp_cat_data C'
D: disp_cat C
R': disp_functor_data F' D' D
R: disp_functor_data F D' D
b, b': disp_nat_trans a R' R
H: ∏ (x : C') (xx : D' x), b x xx = b' x xx
x: C'
xx: D' x
pr1 b x xx = pr1 b' x xx

    apply H.
  Qed.

End Disp_Nat_Trans.

Section Utilities.
  
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
F', F: C' ⟶ C
a', a: F' ⟹ F
p: a' = a
FF': disp_functor F' D' D
FF: disp_functor F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a' FF' FF
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : F' ⟹ F, disp_nat_trans x FF' FF)
     p b) c' xx' =
transportf (mor_disp (FF' c' xx') (FF c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise p c') (b c' xx')

  
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
F', F: C' ⟶ C
a', a: F' ⟹ F
p: a' = a
FF': disp_functor F' D' D
FF: disp_functor F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a' FF' FF
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : F' ⟹ F, disp_nat_trans x FF' FF)
     p b) c' xx' =
transportf (mor_disp (FF' c' xx') (FF c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise p c') (b c' xx')

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
F', F: C' ⟶ C
a': F' ⟹ F
FF': disp_functor F' D' D
FF: disp_functor F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a' FF' FF
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (transportf (λ x : F' ⟹ F, disp_nat_trans x FF' FF)
     (idpath a') b) c' xx' =
transportf (mor_disp (FF' c' xx') (FF c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (idpath a') c') (b c' xx')

a': F' ⟹ F

FF: disp_functor F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a' FF' FF
c': C'
xx': D' c'
nat_trans_eq_pointwise (idpath a') c' = idpath (a' c')

C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
F', F: C' ⟶ C
a: F' ⟹ F
FF': disp_functor F' D' D
FF: disp_functor F D' D
b: disp_nat_trans a FF' FF
disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_id FF') b =
transportb (λ f : F' ⟹ F, disp_nat_trans f FF' FF)
  (id_left (a : [C', C] ⟦ F', F ⟧)) b

  (id_left (a : [C', C] ⟦ F', F ⟧)) b

     (id_left a) b)

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh) =
transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
  (assoc (f : [C', C] ⟦ x, y ⟧) g h)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh)

  
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh) =
transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
  (assoc (f : [C', C] ⟦ x, y ⟧) g h)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh)

D': disp_cat C'

f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w

yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
isPredicate disp_nat_trans_axioms
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh)) =
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh))

C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
x0: disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_comp x y w f
     (nat_trans_comp y z w g h)) xx ww
isaprop (disp_nat_trans_axioms x0)
 apply isaprop_disp_nat_trans_axioms. 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh)) =
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh))

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' =
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh)) c'

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx' =
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh)) c' xx'

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh)) c' xx' =
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx'

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (transportb (λ f0 : x ⟹ w, disp_nat_trans f0 xx ww)
     (assoc f g h)
     (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg)
        hh)) c' xx' = ?b
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
?b =
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx'
 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh
     c' xx') =
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx'

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx' =
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh
     c' xx')

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
pr1
  (disp_nat_trans_comp ff (disp_nat_trans_comp gg hh))
  c' xx' = ?b
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh
     c' xx')
 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
transportb (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (assoc (f c') (g c') (h c'))
  (ff c' xx' ;; gg c' xx' ;; hh c' xx') =
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh
     c' xx')

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (! assoc (f c') (g c') (h c'))
  (ff c' xx' ;; gg c' xx' ;; hh c' xx') =
transportf (mor_disp (xx c' xx') (ww c' xx'))
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_trans_comp ff gg) hh
     c' xx')

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z, w: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
g: y ⟹ z
h: z ⟹ w
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
zz: disp_functor z D' D
ww: disp_functor w D' D
ff: disp_nat_trans f xx yy
gg: disp_nat_trans g yy zz
hh: disp_nat_trans h zz ww
c': C'
xx': D' c'
! assoc (f c') (g c') (h c') =
nat_trans_eq_pointwise (! assoc f g h) c'

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isaset (disp_nat_trans f xx yy)

  
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isaset (disp_nat_trans f xx yy)

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isaset (disp_nat_trans f xx yy)
 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isaset (disp_nat_trans f xx yy)

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isofhlevel 2 (disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy)
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
∏ x0 : disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy,
isofhlevel 2 (disp_nat_trans_axioms x0)

    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
isofhlevel 2 (disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy)
 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
t: C'
t0: D' t
isofhlevel 2 (xx t t0 -->[ f t] yy t t0)

      apply homsets_disp.
    
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
∏ x0 : disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy,
isofhlevel 2 (disp_nat_trans_axioms x0)
 
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
d: disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy
isofhlevel 2 (disp_nat_trans_axioms d)

      
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
d: disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy
t, t0: C'
t1: C' ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t2: D' t
t3: D' t0
t4: t2 -->[ t1] t3
isofhlevel 2
  (♯ xx t4 ;; d t0 t3 =
   transportb (mor_disp (xx t t2) (yy t0 t3))
     (nat_trans_ax f t t0 t1) (d t t2 ;; ♯ yy t4))

      
C', C: category
D': disp_cat C'
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C' ⟶ C
f: x ⟹ y
xx: disp_functor x D' D
yy: disp_functor y D' D
d: disp_nat_trans_data f xx yy
t, t0: C'
t1: C' ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t2: D' t
t3: D' t0
t4: t2 -->[ t1] t3
isofhlevel 1
  (♯ xx t4 ;; d t0 t3 =
   transportb (mor_disp (xx t t2) (yy t0 t3))
     (nat_trans_ax f t t0 t1) (d t t2 ;; ♯ yy t4))
 apply homsets_disp.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans (pre_whisker F n)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans (pre_whisker F n)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_data (pre_whisker F n)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (pre_whisker F n)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_data (pre_whisker F n)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)
 exact (λ x xx, nn (F x) (FF x xx)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
n: G₁ ⟹ G₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG₁: disp_functor G₁ D₂ D₃
GG₂: disp_functor G₂ D₂ D₃
nn: disp_nat_trans n GG₁ GG₂
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (pre_whisker F n)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), nn (F x) (FF x xx))
 abstract
        (intros x y f xx yy ff ; cbn ;
         rewrite (disp_nat_trans_ax nn) ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply C₃).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_nat_trans (post_whisker n G)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_nat_trans (post_whisker n G)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_nat_trans_data (post_whisker n G)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (post_whisker n G)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_nat_trans_data (post_whisker n G)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)
 exact (λ x xx, ♯ GG (nn x xx)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
n: F₁ ⟹ F₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
nn: disp_nat_trans n FF₁ FF₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (post_whisker n G)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), ♯ GG (nn x xx))
 abstract
        (intros x y f xx yy ff ; cbn ;
         rewrite <- !(disp_functor_comp_var GG) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite (disp_nat_trans_ax_var nn) ;
         rewrite disp_functor_transportf ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply C₃).
  Defined.

End Utilities.

Section CompDispNatTransOverId.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C}
          {FF GG HH : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂}
          (α : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _) FF GG)
          (β : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _) GG HH).

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
x: C
xx: D₁ x
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
· nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x =
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x

    abstract
      (cbn ;
       apply id_left).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
disp_nat_trans_axioms disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
disp_nat_trans_axioms disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; transportf
             (λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
              FF y yy -->[ z] HH y yy)
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                y) (α y yy ;; β y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] HH x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (α x xx ;; β x xx) ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; transportf
             (λ z : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
              FF y yy -->[ z] HH y yy)
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                y) (α y yy ;; β y yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] HH x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (α x xx ;; β x xx) ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (α y yy ;; β y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] HH x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (α x xx ;; β x xx) ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (α y yy ;; β y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
        (identity x) f
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
     (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff))

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (α y yy ;; β y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
     (assoc f (identity y) (identity y))
     (♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
     (! assoc f (identity y) (identity y))
     (♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy) = ?b
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity x · identity x) 
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy) = ?b

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; α y yy ;; β y yy = ?t2

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; α y yy = ?y'

      exact (disp_nat_trans_ax α ff).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x y f) (α x xx ;; ♯ GG ff) ;; β y yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths
     (compose (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (f · identity y) (identity y)
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   ! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
     (assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
        (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (maponpaths
     (compose (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (f · identity y) (identity y)
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   ! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
     (! assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
          ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f))
     (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (! assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
       ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (f · identity y) (identity y)
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x y f) @
   ! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y))
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (HH y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) f
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx ;; ♯ HH ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
    (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
    ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) @
maponpaths
  (compose (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
       x y f) @
assoc (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) (identity y) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
   · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f) (f · identity y)
  (identity y)
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
       x y f) @
! assoc f (identity y) (identity y) @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof y) =
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
  (identity x) f
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF
  HH

     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH

(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦

          C x,

          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data.
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
FF, GG, HH: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂

  FF GG
β: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG HH
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ 
         functor_identity
          C x,
         functor_identity
          C x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] HH x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
     x)
  (α x xx ;; β x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C)) FF HH
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF HH,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_axioms.
  Defined.
End CompDispNatTransOverId.

Section PreWhiskDispNatTransOverId.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ D₃ : disp_cat C}
          (FF : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂)
          {GG₁ GG₂ : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃}
          (α : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _) GG₁ GG₂).

  Let disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
        (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)
    := λ x xx, α x (FF x xx).

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ GG₁ (♯ FF ff) ;; disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data
                     y yy =
transportb
  (mor_disp (GG₁ x (FF x xx)) (GG₂ y (FF y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data x xx ;; 
   ♯ GG₂ (♯ FF ff))

    exact (disp_nat_trans_ax α (♯ FF ff)).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂)
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data.
    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG₁, GG₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  GG₁ GG₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
α x (FF x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₁)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF GG₂)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₁)
         (disp_functor_composite FF GG₂),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_data
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker_axioms.
  Defined.
End PreWhiskDispNatTransOverId.

Section PreWhiskDispNatTransOverId.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ D₃ : disp_cat C}
          {FF₁ FF₂ : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂}
          (GG : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃)
          (α : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id _) FF₁ FF₂).

  Let disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
        (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)
    := λ x xx, (♯ GG (α x xx)).

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff) ;; ♯ GG (α y yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF₁ x xx)) (GG y (FF₂ y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (♯ GG (α x xx) ;; ♯ GG (♯ FF₂ ff))

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (nat_trans_id

     FF₂ GG)

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF₁ x xx)) (GG y (FF₂ y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data 
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (♯ GG (α x xx) ;; ♯ GG (♯ FF₂ ff))

D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C

  (nat_trans_id

C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff) ;; ♯ GG (α y yy)

      exact (disp_functor_comp_var GG (♯ FF₁ ff) (α y yy)).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (GG (functor_identity C x) (FF₁ x xx))
     (GG (functor_identity C y) (FF₂ y yy)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y))
  (♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff ;; α y yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (GG x (FF₁ x xx)) (GG y (FF₂ y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
        (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (♯ GG (α x xx) ;; ♯ GG (♯ FF₂ ff))

  (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)

  (♯ GG (♯ FF₁ ff ;; α y yy)) = ?b
