          (functor_identity_data C)) x y f)
  (♯ GG (α x xx) ;; ♯ GG (♯ FF₂ ff))

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
    (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x)
    ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f) @
maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
       x y f) @
functor_comp (functor_identity C)
  ((# (functor_identity C))%cat f)
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) y) =
! is_nat_trans_id
    (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C)
       (functor_identity_data C)) x y f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans 
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG)
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data.
    
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF₁, FF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
α: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  FF₁ FF₂
disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D₁ x),
♯ GG (α x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity
        C
      ∙ functor_identity
         C))
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₁ GG)
  (disp_functor_composite
     FF₂ GG)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_composite FF₁ GG)
         (disp_functor_composite FF₂ GG),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_data
 exact disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker_axioms.
  Defined.
End PreWhiskDispNatTransOverId.

(** Pointwise inverse of displayed natural transformation *)
Section PointwiseInverse.
  Context {C C' : category}
          {F : C ⟶ C'}
          {D : disp_cat C} {D' : disp_cat C'}
          {FF : disp_functor F D D'} {GG : disp_functor F D D'}
          (αα : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG)
          (Hαα : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
                 is_z_iso_disp
                   (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x))
                   (pr1 αα x xx)).

  Let pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F) GG FF
    := λ x xx, inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx).

  
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data x xx ;; ♯ FF
                                                 ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
make_z_iso_disp (pr1 αα x xx) (Hαα x xx) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                             pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                                               y yy) =
make_z_iso_disp (pr1 αα x xx) (Hαα x xx) ;; transportb
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy))
                                              (nat_trans_ax
                                                 (nat_trans_id
                                                 F) x
                                                 y f)
                                              (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                                                 x xx ;; 
                                               ♯ FF ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 αα x xx ;; (♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                             y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; transportb
                 (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                 (is_nat_trans_id F x y f)
                 (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; transportb
                 (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                 (is_nat_trans_id F x y f)
                 (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; transportf
                 (mor_disp (GG x xx) (FF y yy))
                 (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)
                 (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                     x xx ;; ♯ FF ff))

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                       x xx ;; ♯ FF ff))

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                       x xx ;; ♯ FF ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc 
       (identity (pr1 F x)) 
       ((# F)%cat f) 
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; 
   ♯ GG ff ;; 
   pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data y yy)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                    x xx ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b

      
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data x
                 xx ;; ♯ FF ff = ?t2

      
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 αα x xx ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data x
                 xx = ?y'

      apply (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp (Hαα x xx)).
    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))
     (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy)

F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))
     (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?b
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc 
       (identity (pr1 F x)) 
       ((# F)%cat f) 
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; 
   ♯ GG ff ;; 
   pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data y yy)

        apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker.
      
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
     (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x))))
  (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff) = ?t2

C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
     (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x))))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF ff)) = ?t2

      apply transport_f_f.
    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
        (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) (♯ FF ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy)

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
      (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
      ((# F)%cat f)
      (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)

                               y yy)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) = pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
    cancel_postcomposition 
      (identity (pr1 F x))
      (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
      ((# F)%cat f)
      (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
   ! assoc 
       (identity (pr1 F x)) 
       (identity (F x)) 
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths 
     (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) 
  (♯ FF ff) =
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc 
       (identity (pr1 F x)) 
       ((# F)%cat f) 
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; 
   ♯ GG ff ;; 
   pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data y yy)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) = pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff

      
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff)

      exact (pr2 αα x y f xx yy ff).
    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
    cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
      (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
      ((# F)%cat f)
      (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
           (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                               y yy)

  (pr1 αα x xx ;; ♯ GG ff ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data

      (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso

   ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
     (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) (♯ FF ff)

F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =

  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))

       (identity (pr1 F x)) 
       ((# F)%cat f)

         (identity (F x)) 
         ((# F)%cat f) @

        (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) 
     (♯ FF ff))

xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                            y yy = ?t2

F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (F y)))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (pr1 αα y yy ;; pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
                                y yy)) = ?t2

F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

  (nat_trans_id

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: D y

             (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
             (id_disp (FF y yy)) = ?t20

C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y))))
  (♯ FF ff ;; id_disp (FF y yy)) = ?t20

pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
          (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y))))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (id_right ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF ff)) = ?t20

          apply transport_f_f.
        
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     (! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
      maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
             (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) (♯ FF ff)) =
?t2

        apply transport_f_f.
      
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# F)%cat f · nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (pr1 F x) · (# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     ((! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
       maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
         (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) @
      assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
        (identity (F y))) (♯ FF ff)) = ?b

      apply transport_f_f.
    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (((! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
     maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
       (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
            (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) @
    assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
      (identity (F y))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# F)%cat f · nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (pr1 F x) · (# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)) (♯ FF ff) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
       cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
         (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
         ((# F)%cat f)
         (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
              (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
      ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
          ((# F)%cat f) @
      maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) (♯ FF ff))

  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C

       (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @

         (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))

    assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)

     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)) (♯ FF ff)

(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)

       (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
     ((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
       cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
         (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))

C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
?b =
transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (((! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
     maponpaths 
       (compose ((# F)%cat f))
       (! 
        z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) @
    assoc 
      ((# F)%cat f) 
      (nat_trans_id F y) 
      (identity (F y))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# F)%cat f · nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (pr1 F x) · (# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)) 
  (♯ FF ff)

       (identity (F y)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))

C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
     cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
       (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
       ((# F)%cat f)
       (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
            (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
    ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat f) @
    maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
      (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) @
   ! (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
          (identity (F y)))) (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF y yy))
  (((! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
     maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
       (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
            (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) @
    assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
      (identity (F y))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# F)%cat f · nat_trans_id F y)
     (identity (pr1 F x) · (# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)) (♯ FF ff)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
X: transportf 
  (mor_disp (FF x xx) (GG y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; pr1 αα y yy) =
pr1 αα x xx ;; 
♯ GG ff
((! id_left ((# F)%cat f) @
  cancel_postcomposition (identity (pr1 F x))
    (identity (pr1 F x) · identity (F x))
    ((# F)%cat f)
    (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) @
 ! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
 maponpaths (compose (identity (pr1 F x)))
   (! is_nat_trans_id F x y f)) @
! (! assoc (identity (pr1 F x)) ((# F)%cat f)
       (identity (F y))) =
((! id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
  maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
    (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
         (identity_z_iso (pr1 F y)))) @
 assoc ((# F)%cat f) (nat_trans_id F y)
   (identity (F y))) @
cancel_postcomposition
  ((# F)%cat f · nat_trans_id F y)
  (identity (pr1 F x) · (# F)%cat f) (identity (F y))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id F) x y f)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

F: C ⟶ C'

D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'

pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) GG FF

(xx : D x),

  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data

C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) 
(xx : D x),
is_z_iso_disp 
  (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) 
  (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F) GG FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) 
  ?pr1

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F) GG FF
 exact pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data.
    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
FF, GG: disp_functor F D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id F) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (pr1 F x)) (pr1 αα x xx)
pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data:= λ (x : C)
(xx : D x),
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (Hαα x xx): disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id
     F) GG FF
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data (nat_trans_id F) GG FF,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_data
 exact pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans_axioms.
  Defined.
End PointwiseInverse.


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp αα
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) =
disp_nat_trans_id FF


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp αα
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) =
disp_nat_trans_id FF

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp αα
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) x xx =
disp_nat_trans_id FF x xx

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (αα x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx)) =
id_disp (FF x xx)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (αα x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx)) = 
?b
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
?b = id_disp (FF x xx)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (αα x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx)) = 
?b

    
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
αα x xx ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx) = ?t2

    apply (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp (Hαα x xx)).
  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso x))
     (id_disp (FF x xx))) = id_disp (FF x xx)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso x))
     (id_disp (FF x xx))) = id_disp (FF x xx)

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, FF x xx -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (id_disp (FF x xx)) = id_disp (FF x xx)

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
isaset (C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) αα =
disp_nat_trans_id GG


C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) αα =
disp_nat_trans_id GG

  
C: category
D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D x),
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp
  (pointwise_inverse_disp_nat_trans αα Hαα) αα x xx =
disp_nat_trans_id GG x xx

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, GG x xx -->[ z] GG x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx) ;; αα x xx) =
id_disp (GG x xx)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)

xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, GG x xx -->[ z] GG x xx)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx) ;; αα x xx) = 
?b

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG

x: C
xx: D x
?b = id_disp (GG x xx)

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG

?b

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'
αα: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (Hαα x xx) ;; αα x xx = ?t2

    apply (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor (Hαα x xx)).

D, D': disp_cat C
FF, GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D'

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG

xx: D x

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportb (mor_disp (GG x xx) (GG x xx))
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso x))
     (id_disp (GG x xx))) = id_disp (GG x xx)

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

x: C
xx: D x
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, GG x xx -->[ z] GG x xx)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

C: category

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) FF GG
Hαα: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D x), is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (pr1 αα x xx)
x: C
xx: D x
isaset (C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

Section disp_nat_iso.

Context {C C': category} {D: disp_cat C} {D': disp_cat C'} {F G: functor C C'}.


Definition is_disp_nat_z_iso {DF: disp_functor F D D'} {DG: disp_functor G D D'}
(α: nat_z_iso F G) (β: disp_nat_trans α DF DG) : UU
    := ∏ (c:C) (d:D c), is_z_iso_disp (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α c) (β c d).

Definition disp_nat_z_iso (DF: disp_functor F D D') (DG: disp_functor G D D')
  (α: nat_z_iso F G): UU
  := ∑ (β : disp_nat_trans α DF DG), is_disp_nat_z_iso α β.



Context {DF: disp_functor F D D'} {DG: disp_functor G D D'}.

Definition disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans {α: nat_z_iso F G}
(µ : disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α) : disp_nat_trans α DF DG
  := pr1 µ.


disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans does not respect the uniform
inheritance condition.
[uniform-inheritance,coercions,default]


End disp_nat_iso.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: nat_z_iso F G
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
ττ: disp_nat_trans τ FF GG
isaprop (is_disp_nat_z_iso τ ττ)


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: nat_z_iso F G
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
ττ: disp_nat_trans τ FF GG
isaprop (is_disp_nat_z_iso τ ττ)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: nat_z_iso F G
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
ττ: disp_nat_trans τ FF GG
t: C₁
t0: D₁ t
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : D₁ t,
    is_z_iso_disp (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ t)
      (ττ t t0)) t0)

  apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
Qed.


Section disp_nat_z_iso_inv.
Context {C C': category} {D: disp_cat C} {D': disp_cat C'} {F G: functor C C'}.
Context {DF: disp_functor F D D'} {DG: disp_functor G D D'}.

Local Open Scope mor_disp.


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α) DG DF


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_trans_data (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α) DG DF

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
DG c d -->[ nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α c] DF c d

  exact (pr1 (pr2 β c d)).
Defined.


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β)


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
♯ DG Df ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DF b y))
  (nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α) a b f)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF Df)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DF b y)) eq_nat_trans
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF Df)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y ;; 
pr1 β b y =
transportb
  (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
     eq_nat_trans)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF Df ;; 
   pr1 β b y)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y ;; 
pr1 β b y = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb
  (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
     eq_nat_trans)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; 
   ♯ DF Df ;; pr1 β b y)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportf (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc ((# G)%cat f) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
     (pr1 α b))
  (♯ DG Df ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y ;; 
               pr1 β b y)) =
transportb
  (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
  (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
     eq_nat_trans)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF Df ;; 
   pr1 β b y)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y ;; 
            pr1 β b y) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc ((# G)%cat f) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
     (pr1 α b))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
        eq_nat_trans)
     (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF
                                                 Df ;; 
      pr1 β b y))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β b y ;; 
            pr1 β b y) = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc ((# G)%cat f) 
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b) 
     (pr1 α b))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
        eq_nat_trans)
     (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; 
      ♯ DF Df ;; pr1 β b y))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; transportb (mor_disp (DG b y) (DG b y))
             (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b))
             (id_disp (DG b y)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc ((# G)%cat f) (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
     (pr1 α b))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
        eq_nat_trans)
     (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; ♯ DF
                                                 Df ;; 
      pr1 β b y))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df ;; transportb (mor_disp (DG b y) (DG b y))
             (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b))
             (id_disp (DG b y)) = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc ((# G)%cat f) 
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b) 
     (pr1 α b))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧, DG a x -->[ z] DG b y)
     (maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
        eq_nat_trans)
     (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β a x ;; 
      ♯ DF Df ;; pr1 β b y))

         ♯ DF Df ;; pr1 β b y)))

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) 
     ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (! ((maponpaths 
            (compose ((# G)%cat f))
            (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
          assoc ((# G)%cat f)
            (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b) 
            (pr1 α b)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
           eq_nat_trans))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) 
        (♯ DG Df)))

DG: disp_functor G D D'

y: D b

nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f

                                            (mor_disp

                                            (nat_trans_ax
                                               α a b f)
                                            (pr1
                                               (pr1 β)

  (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) ((# F)%cat f)
     (pr1 α b))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))

          assoc ((# G)%cat f)
            (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b) (pr1 α b)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
           eq_nat_trans))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)))

♯ DG Df =

  (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
       ((# G)%cat f))

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f

transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) 
       (α a) ((# G)%cat f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (maponpaths

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG a x))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a))
  (id_disp (DG a x)) ;; ♯ DG Df =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
       ((# G)%cat f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
        (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
           ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))

                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
                assoc ((# G)%cat f)
                  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                  (pr1 α b)) @
               maponpaths

y: D b

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG a x))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a))
  (id_disp (DG a x)) ;; ♯ DG Df = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) 
       (α a) ((# G)%cat f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
        (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
           ((# F)%cat f) 
           (pr1 α b))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (! ((maponpaths 
                  (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                  (! 
                   pr2 
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
                assoc 
                  ((# G)%cat f)
                  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                  (pr1 α b)) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
                 eq_nat_trans))
           (transportb 
              (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) 
              (♯ DG Df)))))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportf (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) ((# G)%cat f)
     (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)))
  (id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
       ((# G)%cat f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
        (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
           ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                  (! pr2
                       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
                assoc ((# G)%cat f)
                  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                  (pr1 α b)) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
                 eq_nat_trans))
           (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)))))

D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'

DG: disp_functor G D D'

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) ((# G)%cat f)
     (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
          ((# G)%cat f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
           (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
              ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
           (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                     (! pr2
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             b)) @
                   assoc ((# G)%cat f)
                     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                     (pr1 α b)) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧,
                     z · pr1 α b) eq_nat_trans))
              (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
                 (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df))))))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
id_disp (DG a x) ;; ♯ DG Df = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity (G a))
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) 
     ((# G)%cat f)
     (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) 
          (α a) ((# G)%cat f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
           (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
              ((# F)%cat f) 
              (pr1 α b))
           (transportb 
              (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (! ((maponpaths 
                    (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                    (! 
                    pr2
                    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
                   assoc 
                    ((# G)%cat f)
                    (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                    (pr1 α b)) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ 
                    z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, 
                    z · pr1 α b) eq_nat_trans))
              (transportb 
                 (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
                 (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) 
                 (♯ DG Df))))))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_left ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) ((# G)%cat f)
     (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
          ((# G)%cat f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
           (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
              ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
           (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                     (! pr2
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             b)) @
                   assoc ((# G)%cat f)
                     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                     (pr1 α b)) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧,
                     z · pr1 α b) eq_nat_trans))
              (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
                 (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df))))))

x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) ((# G)%cat f)
     (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
          ((# G)%cat f))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
           (! nat_trans_ax α a b f))
        (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
           (assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a)
              ((# F)%cat f) (pr1 α b))
           (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
              (! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
                     (! pr2
                          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α
                             b)) @
                   assoc ((# G)%cat f)
                     (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b)
                     (pr1 α b)) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧,
                     z · pr1 α b) eq_nat_trans))
              (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
                 (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)))))) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_left ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_left ((# G)%cat f)) 
  (♯ DG Df)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  ((((cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a)
        ((# G)%cat f)
        (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)) @
      ! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)
          ((# G)%cat f)) @
     maponpaths (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
       (! nat_trans_ax α a b f)) @
    assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) ((# F)%cat f)
      (pr1 α b)) @
   ! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
         (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @
       assoc ((# G)%cat f)
         (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b) (pr1 α b)) @
      maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)
        eq_nat_trans))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
  (id_left ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =

· (# F)%cat f

  ((((cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a)
        ((# G)%cat f)
        (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)) @
      ! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)

       assoc ((# G)%cat f)

      maponpaths (λ z : C' ⟦ G a, F b ⟧, z · pr1 α b)

  (transportb (mor_disp (DG a x) (DG b y))
     (id_right ((# G)%cat f)) (♯ DG Df)) = ?b

  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =

· (# F)%cat f
((((cancel_postcomposition (identity (G a))
      (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a · α a) ((# G)%cat f)
      (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α a)) @
    ! assoc (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a) (α a)

   maponpaths (compose (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a))
     (! nat_trans_ax α a b f)) @

 ! ((maponpaths (compose ((# G)%cat f))
       (! pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α b)) @

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
isaset (C' ⟦ G a, G b ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
Df: x -->[ f] y
eq_nat_trans:= nat_trans_ax (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α)
  a b f: (# G)%cat f
· nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α b =
nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α a
· (# F)%cat f
♯ DG Df = ♯ DG Df
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv {α: nat_z_iso F G}
(β :disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α)
  : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α) DG DF
  := (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data β,, disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_axioms β).

DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_z_iso DG DF (nat_z_iso_inv α)

DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_inv α) DG DF,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) β) ?pr1

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'

DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_inv α) DG DF
 exact (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β).
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

DG: disp_functor G D D'

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
(λ β : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_inv α) DG DF,
 is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) β)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β)

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) c)
  (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β c d)

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α

d: D c
is_disp_inverse

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
β c d ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β c d =
transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) c))
  (id_disp (DF c d))
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'

β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β c d ;; β c d =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (pr1 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) c))
  (id_disp (DG c d))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
β c d ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β c d =
transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) c))
  (id_disp (DF c d))
 exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 β c d))).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv β c d ;; β c d =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (pr1 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_inv α) c))
  (id_disp (DG c d))
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 β c d))).
Defined.

Local Open Scope cat.


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
c: C
d: D c
α c · nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α c = identity (F c)


C, C': category

D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'

DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
c: C
d: D c
α c · nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv α c = identity (F c)

  apply (pr2 (pr2 α c)).
Qed.

c: C
d: D c

transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α c d) (id_disp (DF c d))
