C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d) (id_disp (DG c d))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α c))
  (id_disp (DG c d)) =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d))
  (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d) (id_disp (DG c d))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α c) =
nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DG c d) = id_disp (DG c d)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
pr2 (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α c) =
nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
isaset (C' ⟦ G c, G c ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DG c d) = id_disp (DG c d)
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Local Close Scope cat.
End disp_nat_z_iso_inv.
Local Close Scope mor_disp.



Section disp_nat_z_iso_comp.
Context {C C': category} {D: disp_cat C} {D': disp_cat C'} {F G H: functor C C'}.
Context {DF: disp_functor F D D'} {DG: disp_functor G D D'} {DH: disp_functor H D D'}.



C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
is_disp_inverse
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
     (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d)


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
is_disp_inverse
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
     (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; disp_nat_trans_comp β
                                   β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DH c d))
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d ;; disp_nat_trans_comp
                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β')
                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β) c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DF c d))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; disp_nat_trans_comp β
                                   β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DH c d))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; disp_nat_trans_comp β
                                   β' c d)%mor_disp =
?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DH c d))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
     (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; β c d ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DH c d))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; β c d ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (pr2
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
     (id_disp (DH c d)))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d ;; β c d ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (pr2
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
     (id_disp (DH c d)))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β' c d ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β
                                   c d ;; β c d) ;; 
   β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (pr2
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
     (id_disp (DH c d)))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β' c d ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β c
                                 d ;; β c d) ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
        (pr2
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DH c d))))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β' c d ;; (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β c
                                 d ;; β c d) ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
        (pr2
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DH c d))))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β c d ;; β c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d)) ?e0
  (id_disp (DG c d))
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β' c d ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d)) ?e1
  (id_disp (DH c d))
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c) 
     ?e0 ?e1) (id_disp (DH c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
        (pr2
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DH c d))))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β c d ;; β c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DG c d) (DG c d)) ?e0
  (id_disp (DG c d))
 apply disp_nat_z_iso_inv_iso.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_z_iso_inv β' c d ;; β' c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d)) ?e1
  (id_disp (DH c d))
 apply disp_nat_z_iso_inv_iso.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c)
     (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d)
     (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α' c d)) (id_disp (DH c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
        (pr2
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DH c d))))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (! id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
       (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c)
       (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d)
       (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α' c d)) (id_disp (DH c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
     (assoc
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c))
     (transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
        (! pr2
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DH c d))))

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (! id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
       (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c)
       (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d)
       (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α' c d)) (id_disp (DH c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DH c d) (DH c d))
  (! pr2
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
          (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c) @
   assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)) (α c) (α' c) @
   assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c))
  (id_disp (DH c d))

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
! id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
    (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c)
    (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d)
    (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α' c d) =
! pr2
    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c) @
assoc
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (α c) (α' c) @
assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c)

DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DH c d) = id_disp (DH c d)

β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'

d: D c
! id_conjugation (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
    (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c) · α c)
    (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α c d)
    (nat_z_iso_inv_iso α' c d) =
! pr2
    (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c) @
assoc
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (α c) (α' c) @
assoc4 C' (H c) (G c) (F c) (G c) (H c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) (α c) (α' c)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
isaset (C' ⟦ H c, H c ⟧)

         apply homset_property.
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'

α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DH c d) = id_disp (DH c d)
 reflexivity.
  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
(disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d ;; disp_nat_trans_comp
                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β')
                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β) c d)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
        c)) (id_disp (DF c d))

                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β')
                                   (disp_nat_z_iso_inv
                                      β) c d)%mor_disp =
?b

  (assoc

  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d ;; disp_nat_z_iso_inv

  (id_conjugation (α c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
     (α' c · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c)) ?e0 
     ?e1) (id_disp (DF c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c)

  (id_conjugation (α c)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
     (α' c · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α' c d)
     (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α c d)) (id_disp (DF c d)) =

  (assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c)
     (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
     (assoc

           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)))
     (transportb (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
        (pr1
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
              (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DF c d))))

D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
transportf (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (! id_conjugation (α c)
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
       (α' c · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
       (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α' c d)
       (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α c d)) (id_disp (DF c d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
  (assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c)
     (α' c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)))

     (assoc
        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)))
     (transportf (mor_disp (DF c d) (DF c d))
        (! pr1
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c))
        (id_disp (DF c d))))

       (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))

       (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α c d)) (id_disp (DF c d)) =

  (! pr1
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso

   assoc

        c) (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) @
   assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c)

α': nat_z_iso G H

β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
! id_conjugation (α c)
    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
    (α' c · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
    (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α' c d)
    (nat_z_iso_iso_inv α c d) =
! pr1

  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) @
assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c) (α' c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))

d: D c
id_disp (DF c d) = id_disp (DF c d)

    (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
    (α' c · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))

  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c)) @
assoc4 C' (F c) (G c) (H c) (G c) (F c) (α c) (α' c)
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α' c))
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α c))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
isaset (C' ⟦ F c, F c ⟧)

          apply homset_property.
       
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
id_disp (DF c d) = id_disp (DF c d)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
disp_nat_z_iso DF DH (nat_z_iso_comp α α')


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
disp_nat_z_iso DF DH (nat_z_iso_comp α α')

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α')
  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β')

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d)

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F, G, H: C ⟶ C'
DF: disp_functor F D D'
DG: disp_functor G D D'
DH: disp_functor H D D'
α: nat_z_iso F G
α': nat_z_iso G H
β: disp_nat_z_iso DF DG α
β': disp_nat_z_iso DG DH α'
c: C
d: D c
is_disp_inverse
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (nat_z_iso_comp α α') c)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp β β' c d)
  (disp_nat_trans_comp (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β')
     (disp_nat_z_iso_inv β) c d)

  apply disp_nat_trans_comp_inv.
Defined.

End disp_nat_z_iso_comp.
